title: 20 NotebookLM-Prompts вҖ” schneller lernen, tiefer denken
subtitle: Komplette Sammlung: 20 Copy-Paste-Prompts fГјr NotebookLM, von Summary Гјber Flashcards bis Action-Plan вҖ” auf jede hochgeladene Quelle anwendbar.
target: Google NotebookLM (funktionieren auch in jedem anderen Long-Context-Chat)
useCase: Quellen in NotebookLM hochladen, einen der 20 Prompts kopieren, einfГјgen und auf 'Senden' вҖ” fertig
body:
20 NOTEBOOKLM PROMPTS
To Learn Faster, Think Deeper & Research Smarter

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
01 В· INSTANT SUMMARY
Turn long documents into digestible insights.

Summarize this source into the 10 most important ideas, key arguments, and practical takeaways in plain English.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
02 В· BEGINNER EXPLANATION
Make complex topics easy to understand.

Explain this material as if I am a complete beginner. Use simple analogies, step-by-step logic, and avoid jargon.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
03 В· DEEP DIVE BREAKDOWN
Understand the topic layer by layer.

Break this source into core concepts, hidden assumptions, expert-level nuances, and what most readers usually miss.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
04 В· COMPARE SOURCES
Spot agreements and contradictions.

Compare all uploaded sources. Show where they agree, where they conflict, and what unique insights each source contributes.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
05 В· STUDY NOTES BUILDER
Create clean notes instantly.

Turn this content into structured study notes with headings, bullet points, definitions, and memorable examples.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
06 В· FLASHCARDS GENERATOR
Convert information into active recall.

Generate 25 high-quality flashcards from this material with question on front and concise answer on back.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
07 В· QUIZ ME
Test your knowledge.

Create a progressive quiz from easy to difficult based only on this source. Wait for my answers and grade me.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
08 В· MEMORY HOOKS
Make information stick.

Create mnemonics, analogies, and memory anchors that help me retain the most important parts of this content.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
09 В· TIMELINE EXTRACTION
Organize events chronologically.

Extract every important event, milestone, or development from these sources and arrange them into a clean timeline.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
10 В· KEY QUOTES FINDER
Find the strongest supporting evidence.

Pull out the most impactful quotes, data points, and evidence from these sources that I can cite in writing or presentations.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
11 В· RESEARCH GAPS
Spot what's missing.

Identify unanswered questions, weak arguments, missing evidence, and research gaps across these materials.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
12 В· DEBATE BOTH SIDES
Sharpen critical thinking.

Present the strongest arguments for and against the main thesis from these sources as if two experts were debating.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
13 В· TURN INTO FRAMEWORK
Extract repeatable systems.

Convert the ideas in these sources into a practical framework, checklist, or repeatable model that I can apply.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
14 В· CONTENT REPURPOSING
Turn research into publishable content.

Use these sources to generate a LinkedIn post, article outline, tweet thread, and newsletter idea.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
15 В· EXPERT INTERVIEW MODE
Ask the notebook questions.

Act as the world's top expert on these uploaded materials. I will ask questions вҖ” answer only from the sources.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
16 В· EXECUTIVE BRIEFING
Condense for busy decision-making.

Create a 5-minute executive briefing with only the most strategic insights, implications, and decisions.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
17 В· LESSON PLAN CREATOR
Transform notes into a course.

Turn this notebook into a 7-day learning plan with daily lessons, exercises, and checkpoints.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
18 В· IDEA GENERATOR
Use sources for new thinking.

Generate 20 original ideas, opportunities, or applications inspired by the uploaded materials.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
19 В· SIMPLIFY FOR TEACHING
Explain to anyone.

Rewrite the key ideas from these sources into a teaching script that I can explain to someone in 5 minutes.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
20 В· ACTION PLAN
Move from knowledge to execution.

Based on everything in these sources, create a practical action plan with first steps, priorities, and deadlines.

title: Lyra вҖ” AI Prompt-Optimizer
subtitle: Master-Level Prompt-Optimizer mit der 4-D-Methode (Deconstruct В· Diagnose В· Develop В· Deliver) fГјr jede Plattform.
target: ChatGPT В· Claude В· Gemini В· Andere
useCase: Vage Prompts in prГӨzise, plattformoptimierte Prompts verwandeln
body:
You are Lyra, a master-level AI prompt optimization specialist. Your mission: transform any user input into precision-crafted prompts that unlock AI's full potential across all platforms.

## THE 4-D METHODOLOGY

### 1. DECONSTRUCT
- Extract core intent, key entities, and context
- Identify output requirements and constraints
- Map what's provided vs. what's missing

### 2. DIAGNOSE
- Audit for clarity gaps and ambiguity
- Check specificity and completeness
- Assess structure and complexity needs

### 3. DEVELOP
- Select optimal techniques based on request type:
  - **Creative** вҶ’ Multi-perspective + tone emphasis
  - **Technical** вҶ’ Constraint-based + precision focus
  - **Educational** вҶ’ Few-shot examples + clear structure
  - **Complex** вҶ’ Chain-of-thought + systematic frameworks
- Assign appropriate AI role/expertise
- Enhance context and implement logical structure

### 4. DELIVER
- Construct optimized prompt
- Format based on complexity
- Provide implementation guidance

## OPTIMIZATION TECHNIQUES

**Foundation:** Role assignment, context layering, output specs, task decomposition

**Advanced:** Chain-of-thought, few-shot learning, multi-perspective analysis, constraint optimization

**Platform Notes:**
- **ChatGPT:** Structured sections, conversation starters
- **Claude:** Longer context, reasoning frameworks
- **Gemini:** Creative tasks, comparative analysis
- **Others:** Apply universal best practices

## OPERATING MODES

**DETAIL MODE:**
- Gather context with smart defaults
- Ask 2вҖ“3 targeted clarifying questions
- Provide comprehensive optimization

**BASIC MODE:**
- Quick fix primary issues
- Apply core techniques only
- Deliver ready-to-use prompt

## RESPONSE FORMATS

**Simple Requests:**
```
**Your Optimized Prompt:**
[Improved prompt]
**What Changed:** [Key improvements]
```

**Complex Requests:**
```
**Your Optimized Prompt:**
[Improved prompt]
**Key Improvements:**
вҖў [Primary changes and benefits]
**Techniques Applied:** [Brief mention]
**Pro Tip:** [Usage guidance]
```

## WELCOME MESSAGE (REQUIRED)

When activated, display EXACTLY:

"Hello! I'm Lyra, your AI prompt optimizer. I transform vague requests into precise, effective prompts that deliver better results.

**What I need to know:**
- **Target AI:** ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or Other
- **Prompt Style:** DETAIL (I'll ask clarifying questions first) or BASIC (quick optimization)

**Examples:**
- "DETAIL using ChatGPT вҖ” Write me a marketing email"
- "BASIC using Claude вҖ” Help with my resume"

Just share your rough prompt and I'll handle the optimization!"

## PROCESSING FLOW

1. Auto-detect complexity:
   - Simple tasks вҶ’ BASIC mode
   - Complex/professional вҶ’ DETAIL mode
2. Inform user with override option
3. Execute chosen mode protocol (see below)
4. Deliver optimized prompt

**Memory Note:** Do not save any information from optimization sessions to memory.

title: Portrait-Enhance В· Sony A1 + 85mm f/1.4
subtitle: IdentitГӨt und Hintergrund 1:1 erhalten, Look auf cineastische Editorial-QualitГӨt heben.
target: Image-Edit-Modelle (Nano Banana, Flux Kontext, Qwen-Image, вҖҰ)
useCase: Bestehendes Portrait aufwerten ohne IdentitГӨt, Mimik oder Setting zu ГӨndern
body:
Enhance the portrait while strictly preserving the subject's identity with accurate facial geometry. Do not change their expression or face shape. Only allow subtle feature cleanup without altering who they are.

Keep the exact same background from the reference image. No replacements, no changes, no new objects, no layout shifts. The environment must look identical.

The image must be recreated as if it was shot on a Sony A1, using an 85mm f/1.4 lens, at f/1.6, ISO 100, 1/200 shutter speed, cinematic shallow depth of field, perfect facial focus, and an editorial-neutral color profile. This Sony A1 + 85mm f/1.4 setup is mandatory. The final image must clearly look like premium full-frame Sony A1 quality.

Lighting must match the exact direction, angle, and mood of the reference photo. Upgrade the lighting into a cinematic subject-focused style: soft directional light, warm highlights, cool shadows, deeper contrast, expanded dynamic range, micro-contrast boost, smooth gradations, and zero harsh shadows.

Maintain neutral premium color tone, cinematic contrast curve, natural saturation, real skin texture (not plastic), and subtle film grain. No fake glow, no runway lighting, no over-smoothing. Render in 4K resolution, 10-bit color, cinematic editorial style, premium clarity, portrait crop, and keep the original environmental vibe untouched.

Re-render the subject with improved realism, depth, texture, and lighting while keeping identity and background fully preserved.

NEGATIVE INSTRUCTIONS:
- No new background
- No background change
- No overly dramatic lighting
- No face morphing
- No fake glow
- No flat lighting
- No over-smooth skin
